text:
Clean. Here's the actual root cause:

**`useGasFeeEstimations` defaults to `true` in the Relay SDK.** This caused the SDK's `adaptViemWallet` to forward the quote's stale `maxFeePerGas`, `maxPriorityFeePerGas`, and `gas` values directly to the wallet at execution time. Since these are computed at quote time (potentially seconds/minutes earlier), the base fee may have moved — MetaMask then either inflates the gas to compensate or simulates the tx as failing.

Setting `useGasFeeEstimations: false` on `createClient` tells the SDK to omit those fields entirely, letting the wallet (MetaMask) estimate current gas prices from chain state at the moment of submission.
